build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run version:update && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:11434 http://localhost:8765 https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://api.mistral.ai https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://auth.atlassian.com https://*.atlassian.net https://login.microsoftonline.com https://dev.azure.com

bundle.longDescription: Structured AI-backed assistant for IT troubleshooting, 5-whys root cause analysis, and post-mortem documentation with offline Ollama support.
